studio.name: Orda Games
studio.tagline: Building worlds with style, systems, and strong identity.
studio.heroTitle: A bold game studio website for Orda Games.
studio.heroSubtitle: Show your games, publish studio news, introduce your team, and manage core content from one clean JSON file.
studio.description: Orda Games is a modern game development studio focused on memorable visual identity, sharp gameplay ideas, and scalable production. This site is built to be fast on GitHub Pages, easy to edit, and flexible enough for released games, prototypes, and future reveals.

values.title: Identity First
values.text: A strong studio needs a recognizable tone, visual language, and philosophy across every game and announcement.

values.title: Systems That Scale
values.text: The website is structured so you can add new games, trailers, news items, staff members, and milestones by editing one JSON file.

values.title: Fast Shipping
values.text: No backend is required for the main site. It is lightweight, responsive, and designed to run well on GitHub Pages.

workflow.title: Create the concept
workflow.text: Design the game idea, audience, fantasy, and release roadmap.

workflow.title: Build the playable core
workflow.text: Prototype movement, combat, loops, and core progression until the game feels good.

workflow.title: Ship the presentation
workflow.text: Publish polished posters, store pages, patch notes, trailers, and dev updates.

workflow.title: Grow the community
workflow.text: Use the site as a living studio hub for news, hiring, and future announcements.

games.name: MUTATE.io
games.tagline: Arena PvP where every mutation changes your playstyle.
games.shortDescription: A fast multiplayer action game built around mutations, build variety, and escalating arena pressure.
games.description: MUTATE.io is a competitive action experience where players evolve through mutations during battle. Every choice changes movement, offense, defense, and survivability, creating high replay value and strong spectator moments.

games.name: Night Timber
games.tagline: Collect what you need before the forest finds you.
games.shortDescription: A first-person survival horror concept set in a dark woodland map with roaming danger.
games.description: Night Timber is a suspense-driven horror project where the player explores a forest, gathers logs, and avoids a stalking enemy. It mixes atmosphere, objective pressure, and replayable route decisions.

games.name: Pierbound
games.tagline: Catch fish, upgrade gear, and own the shoreline.
games.shortDescription: A cozy progression-driven fishing simulator with upgrade loops, pier claiming, and trading.
games.description: Pierbound turns relaxing fishing into a satisfying progression game. Players occupy fishing spots, react to bites, land rare catches, sell inventory, and expand their setup over time.

games.name: Project Nomad
games.tagline: Tactical choices in a world broken into shifting territories.
games.shortDescription: A strategy-leaning concept with faction pressure, map control, and long-form progression.
games.description: Project Nomad is a future studio concept focused on tactical planning, identity-rich factions, and evolving world states. It is currently in pre-production as Orda Games explores long-form systems design.

news.title: Website system launch
news.summary: The new Orda Games studio site is live with dynamic content driven by JSON for games, staff, history, and news.

news.title: MUTATE.io gameplay pillar update
news.summary: The team refined mutation stacking and made each build path more readable for players and spectators.

news.title: Night Timber visual pass
news.summary: A new dark forest lighting pass improves atmosphere, silhouette readability, and chase tension.

news.title: Community channels opening soon
news.summary: Orda Games is preparing community spaces for announcements, devlogs, and early feedback.

milestones.title: Studio foundation
milestones.text: Orda Games launches its public-facing identity and prepares its first batch of announced projects.

milestones.title: Prototype era
milestones.text: Core prototypes are built for multiplayer action, fishing progression, and horror exploration.

milestones.title: First public rollouts
milestones.text: Upcoming releases and public tests start shaping the studio roadmap and community expectations.

milestones.title: Expanding the universe
milestones.text: The long-term plan is to grow Orda Games into a recognizable label with a strong style and diverse portfolio.

staff.name: Arlan Oraz
staff.bio: Leads studio direction, product identity, and high-level creative decisions across the Orda Games portfolio.

staff.name: Mira Kassen
staff.bio: Builds core systems, gameplay architecture, and the technical foundations needed for fast iteration.

staff.name: Sanzhar Ilyas
staff.bio: Shapes the studio’s visual language through posters, UI direction, mood exploration, and brand cohesion.

staff.name: Lina Ospan
staff.bio: Owns communication strategy, public releases, studio updates, and fan-facing channel planning.

faq.question: How do I add a new game?
faq.answer: Open data/site-data.json and add a new object inside the games array. The Games page, Home page, and detail page will update automatically.

faq.question: Can I replace the demo posters and staff images?
faq.answer: Yes. Replace the files inside ./images and update the matching paths in data/site-data.json.

faq.question: Does the contact form really send email?
faq.answer: On pure GitHub Pages there is no backend mail server. This version uses a mailto workflow for static hosting. You can switch it to EmailJS, Formspree, or another service later without redesigning the page.

contact.altText: For business, press, collaborations, and publishing conversations.
